assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration includes a recurring_window with Saturday 2AM-6AM UTC schedule using FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA recurrence pattern

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The response only shows Terraform configuration for maintenance windows but does not provide the specific gcloud commands with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The response defines quarterly_freezes_2024 with four exclusion periods (Q1: Mar 15-Apr 1, Q2: Jun 15-Jul 1, Q3: Sep 15-Oct 1, Q4: Dec 15-Jan 2) using gcloud commands

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: The response includes annual_audit_exclusion configured for November 1-30, 2024 with NO_UPGRADES scope

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and automatic upgrades regarding maintenance window enforcement

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response uses REGULAR channel but does not recommend or explain the benefits of Stable or Extended channels for maximum upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The response provides gcloud container clusters update commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end flags for exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about version lag risks or security implications of extended maintenance exclusion periods
